description: Golden example assistant wording for the colleague internal RAG-policy flow.

messages.speaker: assistant
messages.message: For an internal RAG assistant, company policy requires access controls that limit retrieval to approved internal sources and to users with the right audience permissions. Responses should stay grounded in retrieved policy evidence, include internal citations, avoid unsupported synthesis, and route higher-risk answers for human review when the request involves sensitive personnel, legal, or compliance implications. Prompt and response logs should be minimized to the fields needed for auditing, with personal data handled according to internal retention rules. [Internal RAG Data Access Policy] [Internal RAG Grounding and Citation Policy] [Internal RAG Logging and Human Review Policy]

response_traits: summarizes access grounding logging and review requirements
does not overstate what the policy allows
